tasks.label: Stop MCP Dashboard
args: pids="$(lsof -tiTCP:8000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null; lsof -tiTCP:5173 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids; fi; pkill -f "scripts/start_dashboard.py" 2>/dev/null || true

tasks.label: Restart MCP Dashboard
args: pids="$(lsof -tiTCP:8000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null; lsof -tiTCP:5173 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids; fi; pkill -f "scripts/start_dashboard.py" 2>/dev/null || true; uv run --extra web python scripts/start_dashboard.py

tasks.label: Restart MCP Dashboard (Dev)
args: pids="$(lsof -tiTCP:8000 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null; lsof -tiTCP:5173 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids; fi; pkill -f "scripts/start_dashboard.py" 2>/dev/null || true; uv run --extra web python scripts/start_dashboard.py --development
